subcodes.first_line: O thou who arrangest exquisite verses! Verily thy dream was founded upon patience and forbearance in all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظم بدیع الاشعار ان الرویا کانت موسسه علی الصبر و التحمل فی جمیع الشئون
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @wisdom [hikmat]
